description: Restore the legacy wire contract for `ResolveDmsInstanceMiddleware` error responses. Acceptance: the 403 response for a client with no authorized instances returns `type` `urn:ed-fi:api:authorization-denied`; the ambiguous-routing 400 response returns `type` `urn:ed-fi:api:route-resolution-error`; the 404 no-match and 503 missing-connection-string responses keep their legacy `type` values; each response body contains only `detail`, `type`, `title`, `status`, `correlationId`, and `errors`; `validationErrors` is not emitted for any `ResolveDmsInstanceMiddleware` response; `ContentType` remains `application/problem+json`.
steps-to-verify: Add or update unit tests in `src/dms/core/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit/Middleware/ResolveDmsInstanceMiddlewareTests.cs` to assert the exact `type` values for the 403, 400, 404, and 503 paths and to assert that `validationErrors` is absent from the serialized body.

description: Restore the legacy profile error envelope in `ProfileResolutionMiddleware` instead of inheriting the generic `ProblemDetailsResponse` shape. Acceptance: invalid-profile-header, missing-application-context-with-explicit-profile, and profile-resolution-failure responses still return `application/problem+json` with the legacy field set (`detail`, `type`, `title`, `status`, `correlationId`, `errors`) and do not emit `validationErrors`; existing profile-specific `type`, `title`, `detail`, and `errors` values are unchanged.
steps-to-verify: Add or update unit tests in `src/dms/core/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit/Middleware/ProfileResolutionMiddlewareTests.cs` to assert the exact field set and confirm `validationErrors` is absent for representative 400, 406/415, and profile-resolution-error responses.

description: Restore the legacy 500 response bodies in `CoreExceptionLoggingMiddleware`, `ResourceActionAuthorizationMiddleware`, and `ProvideAuthorizationFiltersMiddleware`. Acceptance: each middleware returns the legacy JSON object with only `message` and `traceId`; `CoreExceptionLoggingMiddleware` uses the exact legacy server-error message, `ResourceActionAuthorizationMiddleware` uses `Error while authorizing the request.`, and `ProvideAuthorizationFiltersMiddleware` preserves its legacy message including the appended exception text; these responses do not switch to the RFC 7807 field names and do not force `ContentType` to `application/problem+json`.
steps-to-verify: Add dedicated NUnit coverage under `src/dms/core/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit/Middleware/` for exception paths in `CoreExceptionLoggingMiddleware`, `ResourceActionAuthorizationMiddleware`, and `ProvideAuthorizationFiltersMiddleware`, asserting exact JSON field names, message text, and content type behavior.

description: Keep the DMS-975 runtime fingerprint problem-details contract intact without leaking its additive fields into legacy middleware responses. Acceptance: `ValidateDatabaseFingerprintMiddleware` responses still use `application/problem+json`, include `correlationId`, include `validationErrors: {}`, and keep the DMS-975 URNs (`urn:ed-fi:api:database-not-provisioned` and `urn:ed-fi:api:database-fingerprint-validation-error`); route-resolution and profile middleware no longer pick up those helper-specific additive fields. Implement this either by limiting `ProblemDetailsResponse` usage to the new fingerprint errors or by making `validationErrors` opt-in.
steps-to-verify: Add or update unit tests in `src/dms/core/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit/Pipeline/ProblemDetailsResponseTests.cs`, `src/dms/core/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit/Middleware/ValidateDatabaseFingerprintMiddlewareMissingTableTests.cs`, and `src/dms/core/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Tests.Unit/Middleware/ValidateDatabaseFingerprintMiddlewareValidationErrorTests.cs` to prove the fingerprint responses keep their current shape while legacy middleware responses do not emit `validationErrors`.
